title: ISic003480. Sikel inscription on wall of a tomb
body:
Text encoding: Jonathan Prag
1ΤΟϘΣΙ
2ΑΑ

Text encoding: Jonathan Prag
1ΤΟϘΣΙ
2ΑΑ

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • Text based on editions of Cordano

translation

commentary

bibliography

  • 52.0931.2 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000796
  • 49.1300.2 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000796
  • Cordano 1997-1998 165-169 no.2 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10002068
  • Cordano 1999 679-681 no.2 dr https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10002067
  • Cordano 2012 165 no.1 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10002066

Letters of the archaic Greek alphabet: sigma rendered with a single wavy line; of the two alphas, one is regular, the other the arrow-head form 'alpha siculum'. Of the main group, qoppa is the tallest at 130 mm; of the two alphas, the regular is 170 mm, the sikel form 110 mm

Line 1 up to 130 Line 2 110-170 Interlineation line 1 to 2
